response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Sugu Patra as the performer from on-screen text '#周防パトラ生誕祭'. 2. Identified the first song as an unknown/original track based on audio, no specific title found via search. 3. Identified the subsequent tracks using on-screen text as 'Battle on the Big Bridge' (FFV), 'Megalovania' (Undertale), and 'Seven Heroes Battle' (Romancing SaGa 2). 4. Searched for lyrics for the first song, but no results found. 5. Marked instrumental sections as 'contains_vocal_music: false'.
response.global_summary: A video performance by virtual YouTuber Sugu Patra, featuring an original vocal song followed by electric guitar performances of famous video game tracks: Final Fantasy V's 'Battle on the Big Bridge', Undertale's 'Megalovania', and Romancing SaGa 2's 'Seven Heroes Battle'.

scenes.description: Sugu Patra singing and performing her original song on stage.
Sugu Patra performing 'Battle on the Big Bridge' from Final Fantasy V on electric guitar.
Sugu Patra performing 'Megalovania' from Undertale on electric guitar.
Sugu Patra playing the opening of 'Seven Heroes Battle' from Romancing SaGa 2 on electric guitar.
